subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord and my Hope! How can I make mention of Thee when I am overwhelmed by bewilderment and encompassed by desolation? [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و ربی و رجائی کیف اذکرک و قد اخذتنی دهشه کبری و احاطتنی وحشه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @call to action, @prayer for martyrs, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
